disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Pain began after a fatty meal and has been continuous for more than 8 hours, unlike previous attacks that settled within a couple of hours
trigger_question_examples: When did the pain start and how long has it lasted?
Is this pain different from your usual attacks?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It started after a fatty meal last night and it's been constant ever since — more than eight hours. My usual gallbladder attacks always went away after a couple of hours, but this one just won't stop.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Pain is high in the right upper abdomen and radiates through to the right shoulder blade
trigger_question_examples: Does the pain move or spread anywhere?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's up under my ribs on the right side and it bores straight through to my right shoulder blade.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: High fever with chills and feeling systemically unwell
trigger_question_examples: Do you have a fever or the chills?
Have you felt hot or shivery?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, I feel really hot and shivery — my home thermometer said 38.4 — and I just feel wiped out.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Repeated vomiting with inability to keep fluids down
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I keep being sick and I can't keep even water down.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Taking a deep breath sharply catches the pain
trigger_question_examples: Does taking a deep breath make the pain worse?
Is the pain worse when you breathe in?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes — when I take a deep breath in, it catches really sharply on that right side.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No dark urine, no pale stools, and no yellowing of the eyes or skin noticed
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed your urine going dark or your stools going pale?
Has anyone noticed yellowing of your eyes or skin?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, my urine and stools look normal, and my eyes haven't gone yellow that we can see.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Simple oral analgesia taken a few hours ago had minimal effect
trigger_question_examples: Have you taken anything for the pain?
Did the medication you took help at all?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I took paracetamol and ibuprofen about four hours ago but they barely touched it.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Known long-standing gallstones that had not previously caused significant problems
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any medical conditions?
Have you had this kind of pain before?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've got gallstones — I was told about them a while ago but they never really bothered me before.
